overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character exploring an ancient Mediterranean villa at night. The character carries a torch through a courtyard, enters the building, ascends a grand staircase, and explores an upper chamber with balcony access.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard of ancient villa with stone columns

agents.ego_description: hooded character holding a torch walks steadily through the courtyard toward the building entrance

entered.detail: two-story ancient structure with columns and wooden shutters
large fluted column supporting roof overhang
simple wooden seating with green cushion

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a torchlit courtyard of an ancient stone villa at night. Large columns and a fountain basin are visible as the character approaches the main entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entry hall with coffered ceiling

events.description: character passes through large wooden doors from courtyard into interior

agents.ego_description: passing through doorway into torchlit hall with ornate ceiling

entered.detail: intricate wooden ceiling with square panel design
large open wooden doors with metal fixtures
large stone urn with floral arrangement
wide staircase with red carpet leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character enters the villa through large wooden doors into a grand hall with a coffered ceiling. The space contains decorative urns and dining furniture, with a grand staircase visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with painted walls and ancient reliefs

events.description: character begins ascending the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the carpeted staircase while holding torch, passing painted walls

entered.detail: walls with red ochre paint and decorative borders
stone carvings depicting figures and horses
red carpet runner on stone steps

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand staircase with red painted walls and ancient frieze reliefs. The stairwell is narrow with a wooden railing and carpeted steps, illuminated by the character's torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper bedchamber with animal skins and balcony access

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and enters upper chamber
approaching open balcony doorway with view of exterior trees

agents.ego_description: moving through furnished upper room toward balcony doorway

entered.detail: large bear or lion skins spread on floor
open doors leading to exterior balcony

segments.scene_description: The character enters an upper bedchamber covered with animal skin rugs and furnished with a daybed and desk. The character moves toward an open balcony doorway where exterior trees are visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a torchlit outdoor courtyard into the intimate, elevated chambers of an ancient stone villa at night. It begins by tracking the character past large columns and a fountain basin toward the main entrance, before gliding through large wooden doors into a grand hall featuring a coffered ceiling and decorative urns. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a narrow, carpeted staircase flanked by red walls and ancient frieze reliefs, with the torchlight casting flickering shadows against the stone. Finally, the movement flows into an upper bedchamber adorned with animal skin rugs and a daybed, moving steadily toward an open balcony doorway that reveals the dark silhouettes of trees against the night sky.
